---
title : "Figure 6.6"
subtitle : "Locally linear partitioning estimate"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
target_fun(x) = 0.5 .- abs.(x .- 0.5)

function generate_data(rng; n=100, std_noise=0.1)
    Xtrain = rand(rng, n, 1)
    ytrain = target_fun(Xtrain) .+ std_noise * randn(rng, n, 1)
    Xtest = collect(0:0.01:1)
    ytest = target_fun(Xtest)
    return Xtrain[:, 1], ytrain[:, 1], Xtest, ytest
end

function fit_locally_linear(Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, Jcard)
    bintest = ceil.(Int, Xtest .* Jcard)
    bintest[bintest .== 0] .= 1
    bintrain = ceil.(Int, Xtrain .* Jcard)
    bintrain[bintrain .== 0] .= 1

    ftest = zeros(length(Xtest))
    for itest in 1:length(Xtest)
        bin = bintest[itest]
        ind = findall(bintrain .== bin)
        if isempty(ind)
            ftest[itest] = mean(ytrain)
        else
            yloc = ytrain[ind]
            Xloc = hcat(Xtrain[ind], ones(length(ind)))
            # If underdetermined, fall back to mean, otherwise solve least squares
            if length(ind) < 2
                ftest[itest] = mean(yloc)
            else
                theta = Xloc \ yloc
                ftest[itest] = Xtest[itest] * theta[1] + theta[2]
            end
        end
    end
    return ftest
end
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(1)

fig = Figure(size=(1500, 500), fontsize=18)
Jcards = [5, 15, 30]

for (i, Jcard) in enumerate(Jcards)
    Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, ytest = generate_data(rng)
    ftest = fit_locally_linear(Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, Jcard)

    ax = Axis(fig[1, i], limits=((0, 1), (-0.2, 0.7)),
              xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="|J| = $Jcard")

    lines!(ax, Xtest, ytest, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="target")
    lines!(ax, Xtest, ftest, color=red, linewidth=2, label="regressogram-aff.")
    scatter!(ax, Xtrain, ytrain, color=:black, marker=:x, markersize=10)

    axislegend(ax, position=:lt)
end

fig
```
